## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.3

### 🛠️ Fixes
- Restores LED light switches for supported smoke, CO, and combo detector models when X-Sense sends the LED value after setup.
- Restores mute status entities for supported mute-capable detector models when X-Sense sends the mute value after setup.
- Keeps supported detector controls and status entities loaded with an unknown state until the matching X-Sense payload arrives.
